requested.model: strongest appropriate GPT-5.6 review model available

reviews.finding: The verifier expected validations at steps 100, 200, and 300 even though the unchanged profile validates only at epoch end; the planned budget also still said 900 steps.
The epoch-end validation gate, 2,700-step budget, runner, verifier, W&B inspector, tests, and records were internally consistent with no remaining concrete prelaunch blocker.
